---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: feature

## Summary
A concise description of what you'd like to see.

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this solve? What workflow does it improve?

## Proposed solution
How do you envision this working? CLI UX, config options, etc.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context
Links, references, screenshots, or related issues.
